caption: Knee was acting up at Liberty Monday but still threw a 178. Don't let me forget my brace next week.
178 with a bum knee lol. I was struggling to break 140 so I got nothing.
New welding batch started Tuesday — kid nearly torched his own hood in the first 20 minutes. Classic.
Every year without fail. You around Saturday? Carol wants Linda's pierogi recipe apparently.
